body:

Friend,

Because you've been such a strong supporter, the Official Trump Store is offering you 25% off before MIDNIGHT.

While you can use the coupon code "Moms4Trump" for _anything_ on the store, we've put together a list of items we think would make great gifts for Mother's Day:
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d129ed28677e28b71ccd2207060fd3f3e48f853a3984df920caf0271c8afae59111923500177ebcc3bddc1422a513ae38666509ddaffba4)

**[Shop the Mother's Day sale now. >>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2d129ed28677e28bbcf71bc85b234b9f98caa9fa5288b988f1f93e0a52d27ca4ab2ee61ac04820397199cd27c347410b4f7ed1a8bfb313ff)**

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: It's not a one-man show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
A multimillionaire who very well might clinch the GOP nomination has been writing his campaign check after check. It adds up to a whopping $6 million of his own money in the race. |
---

| | Peter,

I'll be brief: a multimillionaire who very well might clinch the GOP nomination has been writing his campaign check after check. It adds up to a whopping $6 million of his own money in the race. [**I need you to chip in to our $6 drive to help us keep up.**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2095/7377f838/3f0c5405/51f97fa1/3958351211/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180506.1nd&amount=6")

Despite what Rep. Braun may think, politics is not a one-man show. My job is to fight for working and middle-class Hoosiers -- and I can't win without your support, both in the voting booth and financially.

If every person reading this donates $6, we'll have the resources we need to pay for field offices, phone lines, yard signs, and gas for the RV (I hope you're following our tour on social media!).

Will you pitch in just $6? Here's the link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2095/7377f838/3f0c5405/51f97fa1/3958351211/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sixdollardrive?refcode=20180506.1nd&amount=6")

Thanks for all you do. I really appreciate it.

Best,
Joe |
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2095/7377f838/3f0c5405/51f97fa0/3958351211/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Denise Pence
subject: [new video] why Greg is Ready to Serve, Again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Greg is passionate and committed. After being proudly married to him for 36 years, I can guarantee you that he’s the go-to person for many in our... | | |
---|---|---
|
---
[**> > Greg always remains steadfast in the face of adversity, and he’s committed to getting the job done for 6th District Hoosiers. Watch our new video on why Greg is Ready to Serve, Again! <<**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a0841ab6a0354d919310863b8567a737&_e=W0v4MkOjCgfjcUH6j2qrl8f4zRVnMD2NbhnX9Jm8IvKJ2PaKwRXJB48qdhT-0IUg1_UwG3coH8zOiYqEZLgrcxqzJar2noC3A3hPojHji_i2wwdvUFWoWquReuKnN7JDtluKm9mbV6xj7hmZnQU7cGS9hhxHIrnNYqwQi3aQPOC3K5LxDibcpJDsJpmzu2f0lkmpu9UOSyUVVhWpYSxbBQfA9F--GsgaDtoibM6OCfNvlXcVBCcBBIl8FmIU2VwuPjtvk6UqNe-DkmGE_HpURjheQp7D6FStHG_VMeJPxCtjlv4p7S1BXmBC-49-P0EJrgS_QvwkLOw28MkIAoUBBWxGWet9nCqbrdFsOfTo69KoP40IBUZJWCTQRh2q2ET9gAipGRLGJEeWtae7Loe1msea8eSRr6QDGXLmlANYbZ1ICsVkOj81AECUX4ULxo_5)

_Greg is passionate and committed._

After being proudly married to him for 36 years, I can guarantee you that he’s the go-to person for many in our family and in our community – he’s thoughtful, compassionate, and quick on his feet.

Last fall, when Greg told me he was considering a run for Congress because he felt the same call to serve as he did in 1979 when he joined the Marine Corps, I knew he was serious.

**Greg wants to make an impact in Congress on Day One – and I know he will.**

While fighting alongside President Trump, Greg will put his constituents first and will focus on improving the quality of life for all 6th District Hoosiers.

**[>> Vote for my husband, Greg Pence. But first, watch this week’s new video now <<](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a0841ab6a0354d919310863b8567a737&_e=W0v4MkOjCgfjcUH6j2qrl8f4zRVnMD2NbhnX9Jm8IvKJ2PaKwRXJB48qdhT-0IUg1_UwG3coH8zOiYqEZLgrcxqzJar2noC3A3hPojHji_i2wwdvUFWoWquReuKnN7JDtluKm9mbV6xj7hmZnQU7cGS9hhxHIrnNYqwQi3aQPOC3K5LxDibcpJDsJpmzu2f0lkmpu9UOSyUVVhWpYSxbBQfA9F--GsgaDtoibM6OCfOxjsEk9ALUWQ8Cj0iifjx3quhZLXiwd5029A5tV9wX76uUXAPnh_ePOIeav568WY2wPPKPtHu8TCdanRCUtn9WMk4S_ejGufb-QDdN_BtR4wTclpWk26atjJPjBFt5Hiwqjt5E7dRX-wkjJ0C6BP8u5Lx6ZLPA7FcTSUP12ky3ZeFhxDvPpsS1xl24544zVkOnsov5kahM3_SEBTO2f4sU)**

**When Greg says he’s Ready to Serve, Again – Greg means it, 110%!**

Thanks for being a member of #TeamPence. Greg is Ready to Serve, Again!

Denise

**P.S. Primary Election Day is in just TWO DAYS. Vote for Greg Pence on May 8. Find your polling location here** >> **[https://indianavoters.in.gov/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=a0841ab6a0354d919310863b8567a737&_e=W0v4MkOjCgfjcUH6j2qrl7Md5dyiHyBGxx1wswUIsQ6q7OHe9RPF8filrPE0i78sW62dxgY1Viotaeepfx55er3MbTU-TmUnIbuJu-v1LafJiW7nWfJBVRebvI2Onqqex2RsQwZYeIw6O-dA2APdKAkNNY_Aci72MwC08jbNIG4MgL6oK6MefnscvB1HxJxKD6VXFhU3FKyrflpGCFdjCiABB3pPWPMiYPIYodVt-gkUDaU-xFqG598DDKAcppG7AIqnHe75Zt9NXpTed7XJ0ZyLVaThDjDC10K0OHtlp9SicSlnODx6ym3ebAxNj9XfylMDOL5LpPIexgNMaE2ANncuTbbYrYc2pXNg_wXy0imKyWsX-boMA8P4iWp8PUhYwAcxSmMu37tnqEco8cIBCQ%3D%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Statewide_Election_Survey_=E2=98=86_WolfForPa=2Ecom?=
subject: 📍Cresco responses needed (important survey)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | _[**dpwillis67@gmail.com: YOU 'VE BEEN SELECTED TO TAKE A QUICK SURVEY** ](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40c7/4091559121/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+NAMEEMAIL+YOUrsquoVE+BEEN+SELECTED+TO+TA")_ | **STATEWIDE ELECTION SURVEY**

Representing Cresco, Pennsylvania

[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40c6/4091559121/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+NAMEEMAIL") | ZIP: 18326 | | [BEGIN THE SURVEY ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40c5/4091559121/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+BEGIN+THE+SURVEYnbsprarr")
---
_This survey invitation is exclusive for dpwillis67@gmail.com and was delivered on[May 6, 2018.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40c4/4091559121/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+May+6+2018") Responses are urgently required for timely and accurate data collection._
Friends --

_**[Pennsylvania's primary election is just DAYS away.](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40cb/4091559121/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=5+-+Pennsylvaniarsquos+primary+election+is+j")**_

We want to build a winning strategy to defeat our Republican opponent, and re-elect Governor Wolf in Pennsylvania!

But to be successful, we need to hear from grassroots supporters in 18326.

**[So please, can you help represent your area and answer a few quick questions in our Statewide Election Survey?](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40ca/4091559121/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=6+-+So+FIRSTNAMEplease+can+you+help+represen")**
| [BEGIN THE SURVEY ->](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40c9/4091559121/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=7+-+BEGIN+THE+SURVEYnbsprarr")
---
Our strength and success relies on intense grassroots energy from Democrats like you! So as we move forward in this election year, we're asking for your continued input to build a winning campaign.

**[Now more than ever, we need to hear from you. So please, give us your feedback right away:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40c8/4091559121/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=8+-+Now+more+than+ever+we+need+to+hear+from+")**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Statewide-Election-Survey](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40cf/4091559121/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/s/statewide-election-survey?utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=9+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomStatewideElection")**

Thanks for being a part of this team,

_Wolf for PA_

Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40ce/4091559121/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.wolfforpa.com/changeaddress?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_")
We believe that emails are an important way for the campaign to stay in contact with supporters like you. This campaign appreciates any feedback you might have -- positive or negative. [Click here](mailto:info@wolfforpa.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact the campaign with any questions, concerns, or ideas. [Click here](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecd52/73a2bc12/3df3d7e9/1fcd40cd/4091559121/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.wolfforpa.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=tomwolf&utm_content=11+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_&source=em18_180506_statew_clk_clq_act_sur_") if you would like to unsubscribe from Tom Wolf for Governor email updates.

"+" "" Thanks for being a part of this team, Wolf for PA Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor Contributions or gifts to Tom Wolf for Governor are not tax deductible.

name: Paul Davis
subject: Six months away!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ydyuJAh_ZbZKtrbyLEcGX98edYtLxCRvI6qNPFIkpaE=/SRAcOHsom0yeDqa-rCcQLJgeqqR0DbPETP1wC3ls-q4=?gpsid=11_36_327&refcode=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=66864&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=1)
Dear Peter,

Today marks a big milestone: we're officially six months away from the election!

Since we launched this campaign, I've enjoyed talking to Kansans all across the district. It's clear to me that everyday folks are struggling, and that our Congress is hardly doing anything to help them.

**[We can change that. Support this campaign every day until November 6th by making a monthly donation now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ydyuJAh_ZbZKtrbyLEcGX98edYtLxCRvI6qNPFIkpaE=/SRAcOHsom0yeDqa-rCcQLJgeqqR0DbPETP1wC3ls-q4=?gpsid=11_36_327&refcode=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=66864&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=1)**

We can win and start a new era of leadership in Congress if we all work together, but we're up against some pretty big obstacles.

Paul Ryan's Super PAC already pledged to spend millions running ads against me -- and I'm sure that will only be the beginning.

**[These next six months will be critical, and I need you with me every step of the way. Please make a monthly donation now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ydyuJAh_ZbZKtrbyLEcGX98edYtLxCRvI6qNPFIkpaE=/SRAcOHsom0yeDqa-rCcQLJgeqqR0DbPETP1wC3ls-q4=?gpsid=11_36_327&refcode=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=66864&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=1)**

Thank you,

Paul Davis

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ydyuJAh_ZbZKtrbyLEcGX98edYtLxCRvI6qNPFIkpaE=/SRAcOHsom0yeDqa-rCcQLJgeqqR0DbPETP1wC3ls-q4=?gpsid=11_36_327&refcode=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_campaign=em18_180504_6mos2_fnd_gq_ndn__PD&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=66864&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=1)

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ydyuJAh_ZbZKtrbyLEcGX98edYtLxCRvI6qNPFIkpaE=/0wEOWlGmbDRwQPWK4yHhRihzvpkcU8jpRSiHNKB0FKI=).

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The people can win in 50 days.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend,
As a lifetime community organizer and civil rights activist, I've learned that in a democracy the people can win every time -- but only if we have the courage to organize behind the common values we all share.
Since announcing our campaign, we've traveled across Maryland meeting with our neighbors, listening to their concerns, and learning about the direction they'd like to see our state move in.
One thing is clear: Maryland is ready to dream again. We've not forgotten a time not too long ago when Marylanders were able to come together and win the big fights for marriage equality, abolishing the death penalty, passing the DREAM Act and expanding voting rights.
We are still that Maryland, but we need to restore progressive and courageous leadership in the governor's office.
**[Let's do big things on education, healthcare, the environment, and the economy! Will you chip in $5 to our campaign today?](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c83/2875571489/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDUwNjhBIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ05068A")**
We must move just as quickly to a place where we have a highly qualified teacher in every classroom, ensure every Marylander has access to quality and affordable healthcare, fight climate change, increase the minimum wage to $15 per hour, create jobs in our urban and rural communities and make every community safe from the ravages of violent crime and drug addiction.
We can no longer afford half measures and complicit silence from our governor, not when an extremist right-wing federal government threatens our values and all the progress we have made together.
Monday marks 50 days from primary day, and we must never forget our successes are a testament to our courage, a shared vision for a brighter future, and a willingness to come together for a stronger, more inclusive state.
**[Let's get Maryland back to doing big things. Chip into our campaign today](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c83/2875571489/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDUwNjhBIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ05068A").**
Onward,
Ben
****[CHIP IN](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c83/2875571489/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDUwNjhBIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ05068A")****

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c82/2875571489/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c8d/2875571489/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c8c/2875571489/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a60b/7ab0e2c4/7fb93677/349a4c8f/2875571489/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: Battleground Update
subject: This is long. Please read the whole thing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
First, we have to talk about the attacks against Joe. We knew they would come after he stood up to D.C. special interests on taxes and health care. |
---

| | | **"Nation's nastiest GOP primary playing out in Indiana"**
\-- CBS News
---

Peter -- this email is long, but please bear with us.

First, we have to talk about the attacks against Joe. We knew they would come after he stood up to D.C. special interests on taxes and health care. But we didn't know that six months out from Election Day, the candidates running against Joe would have already spent **$7.2 million to defeat him.**

Combined with over $6 million from the Kochs, and more spending from outside special interest groups, that amount is only going to grow. There's no point in pretending otherwise: the other side will have as much money as they need.

**We don 't have a blank check from wealthy donors, but we have something better: people who believe in our campaign to bring Hoosier common sense to Washington. We can outwork the opposition on the ground and send Joe back to the Senate to fight for us with your help. Can you make a donation today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd7/1180316370/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?express_lane=true&refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd6/1180316370/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?express_lane=true&refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd1/1180316370/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?express_lane=true&refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd0/1180316370/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?express_lane=true&refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd3/1180316370/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?refcode=20180506.2nd")**
Second, let's talk about the tone of the Republican primary. It's been getting national attention for how purely nasty it's been. The three candidates have gone as far as to make up their own ridiculous nicknames for each other: "Tax Hike" Mike Braun, Todd "The Fraud" Rokita, and "Missing" Luke Messer.

**Peter, have no doubt: the day after the primary, the combined firepower of all three of these guys and their dark money backers will be aimed at exactly one person: Joe Donnelly.** And the mud they'll sling for the next six months will make the primary look like child's play.

**So we need to get ready -- and yes, that means financially.[Will you pitch in to help Joe fight off the opposition's attacks?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd2/1180316370/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=10")**

They all are ready, willing, and able to work with Mitch McConnell to slash health care, endanger Social Security, and pass more giveaways to special interests. **_And we are the only ones who can stop them._**

So please, don't wait. **[Before the May 8 primary, will you rush a donation to make sure Indiana keeps its commonsense, independent voice in the Senate?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fd2/1180316370/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,
Team Donnelly
** **
** **
** **
****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fcd/1180316370/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-nastiestattack?refcode=20180506.2nd&amount=25")****
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2093/7377f838/3f062016/51f97fcc/1180316370/VEsP/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
